data.name: Shinjuku Hearts 2
data.detailed_description:
Travel beyond the familiar sights of Shinjuku and into the seedy underbelly of Kabukicho. Continue the stories of familiar characters alongside all-new romantic adventures. Meet a vastly expanded cast of intriguing characters who bring the world of Shinjuku Hearts to life.

  • Classic visual novel with a large ensemble cast of characters

  • Detailed and lovingly handcrafted artwork

  • Rich story with genuine characters that balance love and lust

  • Meaningful choices and completely unique endings

  • No censorship, paywalls or micro-transactions

  • Fully native English dialogue
data.about_the_game:
Travel beyond the familiar sights of Shinjuku and into the seedy underbelly of Kabukicho. Continue the stories of familiar characters alongside all-new romantic adventures. Meet a vastly expanded cast of intriguing characters who bring the world of Shinjuku Hearts to life.

  • Classic visual novel with a large ensemble cast of characters

  • Detailed and lovingly handcrafted artwork

  • Rich story with genuine characters that balance love and lust

  • Meaningful choices and completely unique endings

  • No censorship, paywalls or micro-transactions

  • Fully native English dialogue
data.short_description: Jump in heart first into the exciting and seductive world of Shinjuku. A romantic visual novel brimming with touching moments and titillating scenarios.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3, AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
